examples.title: Linear Probing Insertion
examples.code:
FUNCTION insert(key, value):
    index = hash(key) % capacity
    WHILE table[index] is not empty:
        index = (index + 1) % capacity
    table[index] = (key, value)
examples.explanation: Searches for next available slot linearly

examples.title: Hash Table Implementation
examples.explanation: Uses Python lists for separate chaining
